zh.label: 最新版本
zh.title: 设置体验改进
changes: 偏好设置窗口会按当前屏幕可见区域居中打开
选区工具栏图标改为直接选择预设图标，不再需要手动填写 SF Symbol 名称
每个工具栏动作提供一组可点击候选，重置后恢复默认图标
应用、Sparkle 更新 ZIP 和手动安装 DMG 均已签名并通过 Apple 公证

en.label: Latest
en.title: Settings experience improvements
changes: The Preferences window now opens centered within the current screen's visible area.
Selection toolbar icons now use direct preset choices instead of manual SF Symbol name entry.
Each toolbar action offers a small set of clickable choices, with reset restoring the default icons.
The app, Sparkle update ZIP, and manual-install DMG are signed and notarized by Apple.
